item.title: It’s called fusarium xylarioides and it uses horizontal gene t...
item.description:
View on Instagram


It’s called fusarium xylarioides and it uses horizontal gene transfer to harness more power 💪🏼 Lily D. Peck, Theo Llewellyn, Bastien Bennetot, Samuel O’Donnell, Reuben W. Nowell, Matthew J. Ryan, Julie Flood, Ricardo C. Rodríguez de la Vega, Jeanne Ropars, Tatiana Giraud, Pietro D. Spanu, Timothy G. Barraclough. Horizontal transfers between fungal Fusarium species contributed to successive outbreaks of coffee wilt disease. PLOS Biology, 2024; 22 (12): e3002480 DOI: 10.1371/journal.pbio.3002480#Coffee #Fungus

Rodríguez de la Vega, Jeanne Ropars, Tatiana Giraud, Pietro D. Spanu, Timothy G. Barraclough. Horizontal transfers between fungal Fusarium species contributed to successive outbreaks of coffee wilt disease. PLOS Biology, 2024; 22 (12): e3002480 DOI: 10.1371/journal.pbio.3002480#Fungus #Coffee

item.title: AI like SciAgents can accelerate scientific discovery, reduce ti...
item.description:
View on Instagram


AI like SciAgents can accelerate scientific discovery, reduce time spent in labs, and unlock groundbreaking solutions in fields from medicine to materials science!Alireza Ghafarollahi, Markus J. Buehler. SciAgents: Automating Scientific Discovery Through Bioinspired Multi‐Agent Intelligent Graph Reasoning. Advanced Materials, 2024; DOI: 10.1002/adma.202413523#Technology #Engineering

item.title: Coffee & Cognition ☕️ Massimo Barbagallo, Anne Springer,...

View on Instagram


Coffee & Cognition ☕️ Massimo Barbagallo, Anne Springer, Chiara Vanetta, Meret Allemann, Pratintip Lee, Soheil Saeedi, Stefanie Aeschbacher, Marco Luciani, Leo H. Bonati, Giorgio Moschovitis, Victor Scheu, Jonas Rutishauser, Richard Kobza, Marcello Di Valentino, Pascal B. Meyre, Nicolas Rodondi, David Conen, Michael Kühne, Stefan Osswald, Jürg H. Beer. Coffee Consumption Correlates With Better Cognitive Performance in Patients With a High Incidence for Stroke. Journal of the American Heart Association, 2024; DOI: 10.1161/JAHA.124.034365#Coffee #Caffeine

item.title: Love a good snack but keep an eye on size 🥨 to keep an eye on...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Love a good snack but keep an eye on size 🥨 to keep an eye on your size 😜 Madeline M. Harper, Paige M. Cunningham, Ciarán G. Forde, John E. Hayes. Unit size influences ad libitum intake in a snacking context via eating rate. Appetite, 2024; 197: 107300 DOI: 10.1016/j.appet.2024.107300#Calories #Snacks

item.title: So if your neighborhood is 55% more walkable, that adds 19 more ...
item.description:
View on Instagram


So if your neighborhood is 55% more walkable, that adds 19 more minutes of walking per week! Get those steps in 😜Glen E Duncan, Philip M Hurvitz, Bethany D Williams, Ally R Avery, Matthew J D Pilgrim, Siny Tsang, Ofer Amram, Stephen J Mooney, Andrew G Rundle. Association between neighborhood walkability and physical activity in a community-based twin sample. American Journal of Epidemiology, 2024; DOI: 10.1093/aje/kwae170#Epidemiology #Health

item.title: Got milk? Well u should 🐮 🥛 Mariachiara Pucci, Halise Gül...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Got milk? Well u should 🐮 🥛 Mariachiara Pucci, Halise Gül Akıllıoğlu, Marta Bevilacqua, Giulia Abate, Marianne Nissen Lund. Investigation of Maillard reaction products in plant-based milk alternatives. Food Research International, 2024; 198: 115418 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodres.2024.115418#Nutrition #Protein

item.title: Evening Exercise is the best isn’t it 😋** Morning workouts ...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Evening Exercise is the best isn’t it 😋** Morning workouts might still be ideal for some due to convenience or personal preference, but this study suggests that evening exercise could be particularly beneficial for reducing health risks in individuals with obesity. It all comes down to your goals, health condition, and lifestyle! Angelo Sabag, Matthew N. Ahmadi, Monique E. Francois, Svetlana Postnova, Peter A. Cistulli, Luigi Fontana, Emmanuel Stamatakis. Timing of Moderate to Vigorous Physical Activity, Mortality, Cardiovascular Disease, and Microvascular Disease in Adults With Obesity. Diabetes Care, 2024; DOI: 10.2337/dc23-2448#Fitness #Diabetes

item.title: You, me, and chimpanzees 🙈 Elliot Howard-Spink, Misato Hayash...
item.description:
View on Instagram


You, me, and chimpanzees 🙈 Elliot Howard-Spink, Misato Hayashi, Tetsuro Matsuzawa, Daniel Schofield, Thibaud Gruber, Dora Biro. Nonadjacent dependencies and sequential structure of chimpanzee action during a natural tool-use task. PeerJ, 2024; 12: e18484 DOI: 10.7717/peerj.18484#Evolution #Apes

item.title: Attachment issues are real and they start with YOU. The more you...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Attachment issues are real and they start with YOU. The more you know the more you grow and help others do the same ✨Trinh Nguyen, Melanie T. Kungl, Stefanie Hoehl, Lars O. White, Pascal Vrtička. Visualizing the invisible tie: Linking parent–child neural synchrony to parents’ and children’s attachment representations. Developmental Science, 2024; DOI: 10.1111/desc.13504#Parenting #ChildDevelopment

item.title: Why is betrayal so tempting, even when cooperation is better for...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Why is betrayal so tempting, even when cooperation is better for everyone? 🤔 Let’s talk about it.Jakub Svoboda, Krishnendu Chatterjee. Density amplifiers of cooperation for spatial games. Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences, 2024; 121 (50) DOI: 10.1073/pnas.2405605121#Cooperation #Psychology
